ambiguous_cases: alarm beeping but not full activation — caller unsure
emergency_definition.clarifying_question: Is this an active emergency, like a sprinkler leak or alarm sounding right now?

non_emergency_routing.after_hours_action: Collect name and callback number, confirm next business day callback

call_transfer_protocol.transfer_announcement: Please hold while I connect you with our team.

flows.office_hours_summary: Caller is greeted, intent is determined, name and number collected, then transferred to office. Non-emergencies handled same way during hours.
flows.after_hours_summary: Emergencies trigger immediate info collection and on-call transfer. Non-emergencies are logged for next business day callback.

questions_or_unknowns.suggested_question: What timezone is your office in?
What number should we call first for after-hours emergencies?
How many seconds should Clara wait before trying the next number?
If all transfers fail, what should Clara tell the caller?
If our team can't be reached, how many minutes should Clara promise before a callback?
When all transfers fail, should Clara trigger any system notification — like an SMS to dispatch or a ticket?
What phone number should Clara transfer non-emergency callers to during business hours?
Are there any rules about what types of jobs we should or shouldn't create in ServiceTrade?
What is your main office phone number?

notes: Demo call — directional only. Client mentioned sprinkler and fire alarm as primary services. No operational details confirmed. Timezone not stated — Dallas TX suggests America/Chicago but must be confirmed.

changelog.summary: Initial extraction from demo call. 9 fields flagged as unknown. primary_contact removed — escalation_chain[0] is now the single source of truth for primary contact.
